title: FAQ for E-commerce Website
scenario: Create an FAQ section for an e-commerce website selling electronics. The FAQ should include a list of frequently asked questions and answers related to the products, shipping, and returns. The FAQ should be under 200 words and include at least three questions related to product quality.
constraints: Must include at least three questions related to product quality

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the FAQ meets the word count and product quality requirements.
Evaluate if the FAQ is clear and easy to understand.
Check for any grammar or spelling errors.
Evaluate if the FAQ is relevant to the products and the target audience.
